description: PHASE 7: Maintenance - Backend API supporting property-level and unit-level scopes with validation rules, and frontend pages with scope toggle, timeline, and photo gallery. Covers TASK-017 and TASK-018.
steps: Create backend/app/models/maintenance.py with models: MaintenanceCreate (scope literal, conditional validation), MaintenanceAssign, MaintenanceResolve, MaintenanceRate, MaintenanceResponse, MaintenanceDetailResponse

Create backend/app/services/maintenance_service.py with: validate_create (scope-based validation: unit scope requires unit_id, renter must have active contract; property scope requires owner/manager role and location_detail), list (filter scope/status/property/unit/category/priority, RLS: renter sees only own unit requests, staff sees assigned requests), create, assign, update_status, resolve (with cost + photos), rate (only renter who submitted)

Create backend/app/routers/maintenance.py with: GET/POST /maintenance, GET /maintenance/{id}, PATCH /maintenance/{id}/assign, PATCH /maintenance/{id}/status, POST /maintenance/{id}/resolve, POST /maintenance/{id}/rate, POST /maintenance/{id}/photos, GET /properties/{id}/maintenance, GET /units/{id}/maintenance-history
Create frontend/src/types/maintenance.ts with MaintenanceRequest, MaintenanceFilter interfaces
Create frontend/src/api/maintenance.ts with all API functions
Create frontend/src/pages/maintenance/MaintenanceListPage.tsx with 2 tabs (Common Areas / By Room), table with priority and status badges

Create frontend/src/pages/maintenance/MaintenanceFormPage.tsx with 3-step form: Step 1 scope selection (renter only sees unit option), Step 2 location (property dropdown + location_detail for common, or property + unit for room), Step 3 details (title, description, category, priority, photos up to 5)

Create frontend/src/pages/maintenance/MaintenanceDetailPage.tsx with header, photo gallery, status timeline, info section, after-photos, rating form (for renter who submitted), action buttons (assign/resolve for owner/manager)
Create frontend/src/components/maintenance/MaintenanceStatusTimeline.tsx vertical timeline: Open -> Assigned -> In Progress -> Resolved
Create frontend/src/components/maintenance/ScopeToggle.tsx component for switching between property and unit scope views
acceptance_criteria: Backend validates scope correctly: renter cannot create property-level requests
location_detail is required when scope is property
Rating endpoint only allows the original submitter (renter) to rate
Frontend form hides 'Common Area' option for renter users
Timeline component shows progression of status changes
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/PWA-Quan-Ly-Nha-Tro/backend && python -c "from app.routers.maintenance import router; print('OK')"
findings: All verification passed. Backend router imports cleanly. Frontend builds with no TS errors. Minor fixes needed: 1) unused state setter removed, 2) userRole typed as string to avoid TS narrowing issue with literal comparison.
